prompt: The harvester produced this solitaire-game-a11e74-1780215783804.json file. It says gameWon false and about 77% complete. Should I log this as a loss, and how do I ingest it?
assertions: Concludes do NOT log it as a loss (the headline question)
Identifies it as a mid-game / non-terminal snapshot, because solitaire-game-* is a snapshot and gameWon:false means not-won-yet
Recognizes the pipeline cannot distinguish snapshot from terminal (or cites that #a11e74 itself later won)
Recommends not cataloging an outcome and awaiting the terminal solitaire-win-* (defer live kill/continue to solitaire-analyst)
